description: Letter from an authority in Fustat to the leaders of the community of Ṣahrajt. Prefaced by rhymed Hebrew blessings. The sender has previously sent two letters of instructions to the community of Ṣahrajt concerning what should be done with the heirs of the late Hiba. Subsequently, Hiba's sons Yaʿaqov and Ṣedaqa along with their mother arrived in Fustat and filed a complaint against their brother ʿAllūn. It seems they do not yet have any witnesses or court deeds to support their case. The sender instructs the addressees in Ṣahrajt to assemble and investigate the matter. If they cannot settle the dispute, ʿAllūn must travel to Fustat with his brother(s), unless he has a good reason not to, in which case the addressees should send a legal document with their signatures explaining the situation. There follow several stern warnings against perverting justice, including a quote from Avot of Rabbi Nathan. ASE
description_he: מכתב מרשות בפוסטאט אל ראשי קהילת צַהְרַגִ'ת. פותח בברכות עבריות מחורזות. עוסק ביורשיו של הִיבַּא המנוח — בניו יַעֲקֹב וצֶדָקָה יחד עם אמם הגיעו לפוסטאט והגישו תלונה נגד אחיהם עַלּוּן. השולח מורה לנמענים להתכנס ולחקור. אם אינם יכולים להכריע, על עַלּוּן לנסוע לפוסטאט. בהמשך אזהרות חמורות נגד עיוות הדין, כולל ציטוט מאבות דרבי נתן. ASE
